/usr/bin/ar qc ../../../../../lib/Release/libvstgui_standalone.a CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/async.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/genericalertbox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/shareduiresources.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/uidescriptionwindowcontroller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/helpers/value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/platform/gdk/gdkapplication.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/platform/gdk/gdkcommondirectories.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/platform/gdk/gdkpreference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/platform/gdk/gdkrunloop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstgui_standalone.dir/source/platform/gdk/gdkwindow.cpp.o "../CMakeFiles/vstgui_wayland_protocols.dir/wayland-protocols/xdg-shell-protocol.c.o" "../CMakeFiles/vstgui_wayland_protocols.dir/wayland-protocols/linux-dmabuf-v1-protocol.c.o" "../CMakeFiles/vstgui_wayland_protocols.dir/wayland-protocols/xdg-decoration-unstable-v1-protocol.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../../../../lib/Release/libvstgui_standalone.a
